# HSD 14026491531: [PM][DVFS] mem_fabric_freq_lut[0] = min_ratio causing memory ratio not changing even when mem_fabric_memory_bw_threshold[0] was achieved - LUT

## Root Cause Summary

According to Timothy this issue was previously reported by PreSil team.  It was also observed and caused failures for post silicon functional validation where even the most stressful memory content could only get pass mem_fabric_memory_bw_threshold[0] on X ->no memory ratio changed.
